rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in component type scopes and implementation annexes in implementation scopes
Use subcomponent ports only when represented through valid variables or outputs in component type contracts
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scopes
generic_rules: Maintain consistent scope rules for annex blocks
Preserve existing architecture when inserting new annex blocks
Use valid identifiers and types in AGREE contracts
Avoid mixing implementation-specific paths with component type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic
Initialize temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
